description_long: This is a freestanding vertical banner supported by a wooden pole and base, with a horizontal crossbar at the top. The banner itself is made of fabric and displays the Costa Rican national coat of arms, flanked by text reading 'ESTANDARTES COSTA RICA' and additional contact information. The top of the pole is adorned with a decorative finial, and the crossbar features small wooden knobs at each end. The banner is predominantly white with blue trim and is suspended from the crossbar by evenly spaced loops. The base is circular and sturdy, providing stability for the upright structure.
description: A freestanding vertical banner with a wooden pole and base, displaying the Costa Rican coat of arms and informational text on a white fabric with blue trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full banner design, including the Costa Rican coat of arms and all text details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the banner and the wooden pole, with the banner itself barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the banner and the supporting wooden structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the pole and base, with minimal visibility of the banner fabric.
attribute_banner_content: Costa Rican coat of arms and informational text
